title: The Rubber Act, 1947
full_text: The Rubber Act, 1947 रबड़ अधिनियम, 1947 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194724 Act Number: 24 Enactment Date: 1947-04-18 Act Year: 1947 Short Title: The Rubber Act, 1947 Hindi Title: रबड़ अधिनियम, 1947 Long Title: An Act to provide for the development under the control of the Union of the rubber industry.
